# Splines and LOESS: Flexible Regression Curves {#splines-loess}

```{r splines-loess-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/splines-loess-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/splines-loess/"
)
```

```{r child-splines-loess, child="../lecture-content/31-splines-loess.Rmd"}
```
